steps.title: Use corresponding angles
steps.content: Similar figures have equal corresponding angles. The side-length scale factor changes lengths, not angle measures, so the factor of $4$ does not multiply or divide any angle.

steps.title: Match the corresponding angles
steps.content:
The problem states that angle $A$ corresponds to angle $A'$. Since angle $A$ measures $36^\circ$, angle $A'$ also measures $36^\circ$. Choices based on dividing by $4$, multiplying by $4$, or using another angle do not apply.
The answer is B.
